SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class IntegratedProductionModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.IntegratedProductionModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class IntegratedProductionModel extends Object implements Serializable
Integrated "reservoir to market" production model.

This high-level orchestrator couples the four classic production layers - reservoir, wells, flowlines/gathering network and the export boundary - into a single self-consistent model, in the spirit of Petex IPM (MBAL + PROSPER + GAP) and Schlumberger Pipesim. Each well is represented by a fast WellDeliverabilityCurve surrogate; the gathering hydraulics by FlowlineBranch; the reservoir depletion by a ReservoirDrive; and the whole system is balanced by the NetworkNewtonSolver.

Two workflows are provided:

  • solve() - a single steady-state well-to-export balance at the current reservoir pressures.
  • runProfile(double, double) - a time-marched production profile in which each well depletes its own reservoir drive, so rates decline and the field life emerges naturally.

A simple economics layer (hydrocarbon price) turns the export rate into revenue, giving the objective used by ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:
  • NetworkNewtonSolver
  • ReservoirDrive
  • WellDeliverabilityCurve
  • ReservoirToMarketOptimizer

  • Method Details

    • setExportPressure

      public IntegratedProductionModel setExportPressure(double pressureBara)
      Sets the export boundary pressure (separator/pipeline header).
      Parameters:
      pressureBara - export pressure in bara
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

    • addWell

      public IntegratedProductionModel.WellUnit addWell(String wellName, ReservoirDrive drive, WellDeliverabilityCurve curve)
      Adds a well with a direct (low-resistance) tie-in to the export node.
      Parameters:
      wellName - unique well name
      drive - reservoir drive feeding the well
      curve - well deliverability curve
      Returns:
      the created well unit (for further configuration)

    • addWell

      public IntegratedProductionModel.WellUnit addWell(String wellName, ReservoirDrive drive, WellDeliverabilityCurve curve, FlowlineBranch flowline)
      Adds a well with an explicit flowline to the export node.
      Parameters:
      wellName - unique well name
      drive - reservoir drive feeding the well
      curve - well deliverability curve
      flowline - flowline branch from the wellhead to the export node
      Returns:
      the created well unit (for further configuration)

    • setHydrocarbonPrice

      public IntegratedProductionModel setHydrocarbonPrice(double pricePerSm3)
      Sets the hydrocarbon sales price used for revenue calculations.
      Parameters:
      pricePerSm3 - price in currency per Sm3
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

      public IntegratedProductionModel setEnergyIntensity(double kWhPerSm3)
      Sets the processing/compression energy intensity for energy and emission reporting.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      this model for chaining

      Returns:
      this model for chaining

    • runProfile

      public ProductionProfile runProfile(double years, double dtYears)
      Marches a production profile forward in time, depleting each well's reservoir drive.
      Parameters:
      years - total horizon in years
      dtYears - time-step length in years
      Returns:
      the production profile
